summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Founder Copilot MVP. Backend APIs and frontend UI are working correctly with minor performance issues on LLM generation timeouts.

performance_issues.issue: LLM generation requests timing out after 30 seconds
performance_issues.impact: Some valid startup queries fail due to timeout
performance_issues.affected_requests: Valid startup queries with complex prompts

working_endpoints.status: ✅ Working - Health check returns correct message
✅ Working - Correctly blocks joke and poem requests
✅ Working - Both POST and GET operations successful

passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct hero title 'AI Founder Copilot' and subtitle
All 4 workflow buttons displayed and working (Validate Idea, Plan Growth, Weekly Plan, Fix Sales Funnel)
Workflow buttons correctly auto-fill textarea with appropriate prompts
Sidebar navigation with Dashboard and History links working
Submit button state management (disabled when empty, enabled when filled)
Guardrail functionality working - blocks joke and poem requests with 'Out of scope' message
Valid startup queries generate proper execution plans with bento grid cards
All 6 output cards display correctly (Strategy, Actions, Risks, Execution Plan, Insight, Confidence)
Smart action buttons present and working (Regenerate, Make it more aggressive, Reduce budget)
Loading state with skeleton cards works correctly
Response structure validation - all required JSON fields present
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate and fix LLM generation timeout issues. Some valid startup queries are timing out after 30 seconds, which affects user experience. Consider optimizing the LLM call or increasing timeout limits.

success_percentage.backend: 70% (7/10 tests passed - 3 failed due to LLM timeouts)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - 1 minor guardrail display timing issue)
